title: To The Reader
content:
Pray thee, take care, that tak'st my book in hand,
To read it well - that is, to understand.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ben Jonson, titled "To The Reader", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
